name: IREN Childress Campus (Horizon 1)
operator: IREN (formerly Iris Energy) — IE US Hardware 1-4 Inc.
sourceName: Data Center Dynamics — IREN 75MW liquid-cooled AI build (Feb 2025)
note: IREN (formerly Iris Energy) runs a Childress campus that began as a Bitcoin-mining site and is adding AI compute — a ~75MW liquid-cooled build it calls 'Horizon 1.' IREN says the design is closed-loop. Reported acreage figures vary; coordinates are approximate (Childress community level). (Our summary; see source.)
